sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince parametric optimal f procedure: standardize equalized trade data (mean/std dev), derive optimal f from standardized distribution parameters. Position size = f × (Account Size / Largest Loss). Specific f value not provided in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Standardize equalized trade data using mean and standard deviation of the equalized data set, then determine optimal f, geometric mean, and TWR following the parametric procedure outlined in the chapter.
